strings.ui.empty.title: No combat data recorded.
strings.ui.empty.subtitle: (The dashboard will populate automatically after your next battle)
strings.ui.search.no_match: No combat sheets found matching your search.
strings.ui.telemetry.spells_saved_by_enemies: Spells and effects evaded by enemies
strings.ui.telemetry.suffered_debuffs: LIST OF CC / SUFFERED NEGATIVE CONDITIONS
strings.ui.overkill_text: Total damage dealt to targets under 0 HP: {1} (included in the total)
strings.ui.dmg.sneak_bonus: <color={0}>(Of the total damage dealt, {1} were dealt by Sneak Attacks)</color>
strings.ui.context.single_boss: focussed on a major adversary of CR {0}
strings.ui.context.multi_targets: disbursed across a multitude of hostile targets
strings.ACH_DESC_1: Fought with no physical armor equipped, sustained {damageTaken} damage, and evaded {attacksDodged} physical attacks.
strings.ACH_DESC_2: Confirmed a total of {crits} critical strikes during the combat.
strings.ACH_DESC_3: Dealt a single hit of {maxSingleHit} damage using a divine mythic spell.
strings.ACH_DESC_4: Executed a total of {aoos} attacks of opportunity during the encounter.
strings.ACH_DESC_5: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} damage using fused Magic Deceiver spells.
strings.ACH_DESC_6: Fought as the Triceratops mount Bismuth, dealing a total of {totalDamage} damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_7: Dealt a single hit of {maxSingleHit} physical damage, consisting of precision and sneak attack damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_8: Shared rage and the pounce ability as a Skald, enabling at least 3 allies to deal a total of {totalDamage} damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_9: Eliminated a total of {kills} enemies using instant-death effects from illusion spells.
strings.ACH_DESC_10: Combined the Kineticist class and the Demon mythic path to deal a total of {totalDamage} elemental damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_11: Recovered a total of {vampiricHealing} health via vampiric sources while dealing negative energy damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_12: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} physical damage to targets with active Damage Reduction (DR), with less than 10% damage negated.
strings.ACH_DESC_13: Fought equipped with a melee weapon and an active shield, dealing significant damage totaling {totalDamage}.
strings.ACH_DESC_14: Dealt significant collateral damage to allies totaling {friendlyFireDmg}, while heavily dominating the offensive against enemies with a total of {totalDamage}.
strings.ACH_DESC_15: Fought as a Magic Deceiver, reaching an offensive and crowd control contribution of {totalDamage} representing at least 50% of the overall effort against enemies.
strings.ACH_DESC_16: Fought equipped with a bow, delivering massive waves of ranged attacks totaling {totalDamage} representing at least 60% of the party's total damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_17: Reduced an enemy's base attribute score by at least 30% through attribute damage totaling {statDamage}.
strings.ACH_DESC_18: Targeted extreme or mythic threats with at least 5 spells without suffering a single spell resistance failure.
strings.ACH_DESC_19: Equipped heavy armor or a shield, reached an AC greater than 3 times their level, and blocked at least 10 enemy attacks.
strings.ACH_DESC_20: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} damage via swarm or vermin summons, drained enemy dexterity by {statDamage}, and inflicted the nauseated condition on at least 5 targets.
strings.ACH_DESC_21: Successfully executed at least 3 helpless enemies via a coup de grâce.
strings.ACH_DESC_22: Succeeded on at least 5 consecutive Will saving throws against mental attacks from enemies of at least high threat.
strings.ACH_DESC_23: Inflicted a cumulative total of at least 40 negative levels across all enemies during the combat.
strings.ACH_DESC_24: Fought the Demon Lord Baphomet, representing a total of {totalDamage} damage, healing, or supportive control representing more than 50% of the overall party effort.
strings.ACH_DESC_25: Fought as a Cleric and shared more than 40 buffs.
strings.ACH_DESC_26: Successfully dispelled a total of {dispelledCount} active magical effects on enemies of at least high threat.
strings.ACH_DESC_27: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} damage to a larger, high-threat enemy, eliminating them in combat.
strings.ACH_DESC_28: Tripped a total of {trippedCount} enemies using trip maneuvers.
strings.ACH_DESC_29: More than {attacksAttempted} attacks directed at {pronounObj} either failed or dealt 0 damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_30: Summoned a total of {summonsCount} creatures in combat, dealing a total of {summonDamage} damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_31: Equipped a tower shield and blocked a total of {attacksDodged} attacks in combat.
strings.ACH_DESC_32: Resurrected fallen allies in combat at least 3 times.
strings.ACH_DESC_33: Healed allies whose health was below 30% for a total of {healingDone}.
strings.ACH_DESC_34: Fought as a Ranger (Demon Slayer), eliminating a total of {kills} demons.
strings.ACH_DESC_35: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} damage and a critical strike of over {maxSingleHit} using Hellfire Ray magic.
strings.ACH_DESC_36: Equipped a bow and confirmed a total of {crits} physical critical threats.
strings.ACH_DESC_37: Executed a devastating mounted charge, dealing a single hit of {maxSingleHit} damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_38: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} damage using the kinetic blade.
strings.ACH_DESC_39: Regenerated a total of {healingDone} damage sustained by the party, representing at least 50% of the encounter's damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_40: Applied Smite Evil or Mark of Justice, dealing a total of {totalDamage} damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_41: Fought unarmed, dealing a total of {totalDamage} physical damage.
strings.ACH_DESC_42: Fought as a Scroll Savant and cast spells from scrolls of at least level 7.
strings.ACH_DESC_43: Fought the Demon Lord Deskari, delivering an exceptional performance representing at least 50% of the overall effort.
strings.ACH_DESC_44: Successfully dispelled a total of {dispelledCount} active magical effects on enemy targets during the combat.
strings.ACH_DESC_45: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} physical damage in combat.
strings.ACH_DESC_46: Dealt a total of {totalDamage} magical or elemental damage in combat.
strings.ACH_DESC_47: Applied a total of {totalCC} status conditions or crowd control effects to enemies.
strings.ACH_DESC_48: Bestowed a total of {supportBuffsCast} buffs to the party.
strings.ACH_DESC_49: Healed a total of {healingDone} damage sustained by allies.
strings.ACH_DESC_50: Bestowed at least 20 buffs on the party and successfully applied at least 10 debuffs or negative conditions to enemies.
